<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-HK">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-
scale=1.0, user-scalable=no, viewport-fit=cover">
<title>韓國復活節旅行 App v3.1</title>
<!-- Vue 3 CDN -->
<script src="https://unpkg.com/vue@3/dist/vue.global.js"></script>
<!-- Tailwind CSS CDN -->
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
<!-- FontAwesome CDN -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-
awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
<!-- Google Fonts: Noto Sans TC -->
<link
href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Sans+TC:wght@400;500;700;900&dis
play=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
--safe-area-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 20px);
}
body, html {
margin: 0; padding: 0; height: 100%;
background-color: #f3f4f6;
font-family: 'Noto Sans TC', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
overflow: hidden;
-webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
}
#app {
display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%; max-width: 480px; margin: 0 auto;
background: #fafaf9;
box-shadow: 0 0 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
position: relative;
}
header {
padding: calc(env(safe-area-inset-top) + 12px) 16px 16px 16px;
border-bottom-left-radius: 24px;
border-bottom-right-radius: 24px;
}
main {
flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; overflow-x: hidden; padding-bottom: 24px;
-ms-overflow-style: none; scrollbar-width: none;
scroll-behavior: smooth;
}
main::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
.nav-bar {
background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
-webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
border-top: 1px solid rgba(244, 63, 94, 0.1);
display: flex; justify-content: space-around;
padding: 12px 12px var(--safe-area-bottom) 12px;
flex-shrink: 0;
border-top-left-radius: 24px;
border-top-right-radius: 24px;
box-shadow: 0 -10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.03);
}
.nav-item {
display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
color: #a8a29e; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 500;
transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
width: 18%;
padding: 6px 0;
border-radius: 16px;
}
.nav-item.active {
color: #f43f5e;
background: rgba(255, 228, 230, 0.5);
transform: translateY(-2px);
}
.nav-item i { font-size: 1.35rem; margin-bottom: 4px; transition: transform 0.3s ease; }
.nav-item.active i { transform: scale(1.1); }
.fade-enter-active, .fade-leave-active { transition: opacity 0.25s ease, transform 0.25s
ease; }
.fade-enter-from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); }
.fade-leave-to { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-10px); }
.line-clamp-2 { display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
overflow: hidden; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="app" v-cloak>
<!-- Top Header -->
<header class="bg-gradient-to-r from-rose-400 via-pink-400 to-rose-400 text-white
shadow-md z-10 flex justify-center items-end h-20 shrink-0 relative">
<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-white opacity-10 rounded-b-3xl"></div>
<h1 class="text-lg font-bold tracking-widest relative z-10 drop-shadow-sm">{{
tabNames[currentTab] }}</h1>
</header>
<!-- Main Content Area -->
<main>
<transition name="fade" mode="out-in">
<!-- 1. Dashboard -->
<div v-if="currentTab === 'dashboard'" class="p-5 space-y-5" key="dash">
<div class="bg-gradient-to-br from-rose-400 to-[#cd5c6f] rounded-3xl p-6 text-white
shadow-lg shadow-rose-200 relative overflow-hidden">
<div class="absolute -right-4 -bottom-4 w-32 h-32 bg-white rounded-full opacity-10
blur-2xl"></div>
<i class="fas fa-heart absolute -right-2 -top-2 text-7xl opacity-15 rotate-12"></i>
<div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-4 relative z-10">
<span class="bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-md text-[10px] px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full
font-bold tracking-widest uppercase">15th Anniversary</span>
<span class="text-xs font-bold bg-rose-900/30 px-2 py-1 rounded-lg">26' 韓國
</span>
</div>
<h2 class="text-xl font-black mb-3 drop-shadow-sm relative z-10">我們的婚前畢業旅
行 💍</h2>
<p class="text-[13px] leading-relaxed font-medium text-rose-50 relative z-10">
「城市感、海邊感、櫻花季、韓流變身與情侶街拍，所有願望都濃縮在這 7 天 6 夜裡。
不趕行程、不吵架，牽緊彼此的手...」
</p>
</div>
<div class="pt-2 px-1">
<h3 class="font-bold text-gray-800 text-sm flex items-center mb-3">
<i class="fas fa-chart-pie text-rose-400 mr-2"></i>旅程推進儀表板
</h3>
</div>
<div @click="jumpToTab('itinerary')" class="bg-white rounded-[24px] shadow-sm
border border-gray-100 p-5 active:scale-95 transition-transform cursor-pointer relative
overflow-hidden group hover:shadow-md">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-2">
<div class="flex items-center">
<div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-blue-50 text-blue-500 flex items-center
justify-center mr-3">
<i class="fas fa-map-marked-alt text-lg"></i>
</div>
<div>
<h4 class="font-bold text-gray-800 text-sm">一起走過的約會</h4>
<p class="text-[11px] text-gray-400 font-medium mt-0.5">已完成 {{
itineraryStats.done }} / 共 {{ itineraryStats.total }} 個行程</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="text-xl font-black text-blue-500">{{ itineraryStats.percent }}%</div>
</div>
<div class="w-full bg-gray-100 rounded-full h-1.5 mt-3 overflow-hidden">
<div class="bg-blue-400 h-1.5 rounded-full transition-all duration-1000 ease-out"
:style="{ width: itineraryStats.percent + '%' }"></div>
</div>
</div>
<div @click="jumpToTab('checklists')" class="bg-white rounded-[24px] shadow-sm
border border-gray-100 p-5 active:scale-95 transition-transform cursor-pointer relative
overflow-hidden group hover:shadow-md">
<div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-2">
<div class="flex items-center">
<div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-500 flex items-
center justify-center mr-3">
<i class="fas fa-suitcase-rolling text-lg"></i>
</div>
<div>
<h4 class="font-bold text-gray-800 text-sm">任務與打包進度</h4>
<p class="text-[11px] text-gray-400 font-medium mt-0.5">已勾選 {{
checklistStats.done }} / 共 {{ checklistStats.total }} 項</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="text-xl font-black text-emerald-500">{{ checklistStats.percent }}%</div>
</div>
<div class="w-full bg-gray-100 rounded-full h-1.5 mt-3 overflow-hidden">
<div class="bg-emerald-400 h-1.5 rounded-full transition-all duration-1000 ease-
out" :style="{ width: checklistStats.percent + '%' }"></div>
</div>
</div>
<div @click="jumpToTab('budget')" class="bg-white rounded-[24px] shadow-sm
border border-gray-100 p-5 active:scale-95 transition-transform cursor-pointer relative
overflow-hidden group hover:shadow-md">
<div class="flex justify-between items-start mb-2">
<div class="flex items-center">
<div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-orange-50 text-orange-500 flex items-
center justify-center mr-3">
<i class="fas fa-wallet text-lg"></i>
</div>
<div>
<h4 class="font-bold text-gray-800 text-sm">還可以揮霍的錢錢</h4>
<p class="text-[11px] text-gray-400 font-medium mt-0.5">點擊記錄新花費 💍</p>
</div>
</div>
<span class="text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded-md"
:class="budgetPercent > 90 ? 'bg-red-50 text-red-500' : 'bg-orange-50 text-
orange-600'">
已用 {{ budgetPercent }}%
</span>
</div>
<div class="mt-2 text-right">
<span class="text-3xl font-black tracking-tight" :class="remainingBudget < 0 ? 'text-
red-500' : 'text-gray-800'">
<span class="text-lg text-gray-400 mr-1 font-bold">HKD</span>{{
remainingBudget.toLocaleString() }}
</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- ============================================== -->
<!-- 2. Itinerary (v3.1 全新全視角 7 天切換器) -->
<!-- ============================================== -->
<div v-else-if="currentTab === 'itinerary'" class="flex flex-col h-full bg-gray-50/50"
key="itin">
<!-- v3.1 免滾動 7 日全景切換器 (Segmented Control) -->
<div class="bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-md shadow-[0_4px_15px_rgba(0,0,0,0.03)]
sticky top-0 z-20 shrink-0 rounded-b-3xl border-b border-gray-100">
<div class="pt-4 pb-2 px-4">
<!-- 7-day pill container -->
<div class="bg-gray-100/80 p-1.5 rounded-[20px] flex justify-between items-center
gap-1 relative shadow-inner">
<button v-for="(day, index) in days" :key="day" @click="activeDay = day"
class="flex-1 py-2.5 flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-[14px]
transition-all duration-300 z-10"
:class="activeDay === day ? 'bg-white shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]
transform scale-[1.02]' : 'hover:bg-gray-200/50 active:scale-95'">
<span class="text-[12px] font-black transition-colors"
:class="activeDay === day ? 'text-rose-500' : 'text-gray-400'">
D{{index+1}}
</span>
</button>
</div>
</div>
<!-- 沉浸式日期標題列 -->
<div class="px-5 pb-3 pt-1 flex justify-center">
<span class="text-[11px] font-bold text-gray-700 bg-rose-50 px-4 py-1.5 rounded-
full border border-rose-100 flex items-center shadow-sm w-full justify-center">
<i class="far fa-calendar-alt text-rose-400 mr-1.5 text-sm"></i>
{{ itineraryHeaders[activeDay] }}
</span>
</div>
</div>
<!-- 行程時間軸區塊 -->
<div class="p-5 pb-8 relative">
<!-- 時間軸貫穿中線 (配合上方移除了標題，位置微調至 top-6) -->
<div class="absolute left-[39px] top-6 bottom-8 w-0.5 bg-rose-100 rounded-
full"></div>
<div class="space-y-6 relative z-0">
<div v-for="(item, idx) in itinerary[activeDay]" :key="idx"
class="relative flex items-start group"
:class="{'opacity-60 grayscale-[30%]': item.done}">
<div class="flex-shrink-0 w-16 pt-3 text-right pr-4">
<span class="text-rose-500 font-bold text-[13px] block">{{ item.time }}</span>
</div>
<div class="absolute left-16 top-4 w-3.5 h-3.5 rounded-full border-2 border-white
shadow-sm z-10"
:class="item.done ? 'bg-green-400' : 'bg-rose-400'"></div>
<div class="flex-1 ml-6 bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100
transition-all duration-200"
@click="item.expanded = !item.expanded">
<div class="p-4 flex justify-between items-start cursor-pointer">
<div class="pr-3">
<h3 class="font-bold text-gray-800 text-sm mb-1.5 leading-snug" :class="{'line-
through text-gray-400': item.done}">{{ item.title }}</h3>
<p v-if="!item.expanded" class="text-xs text-gray-500 line-clamp-2">{{
item.desc }}</p>
</div>
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-between shrink-0">
<button @click.stop="item.done = !item.done" class="text-2xl transition-colors
focus:outline-none h-8 w-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-full active:bg-gray-100">
<i :class="item.done ? 'fas fa-check-circle text-green-500' : 'far fa-circle text-
gray-300'"></i>
</button>
</div>
</div>
<div v-show="item.expanded" class="px-4 pb-4 bg-rose-50/30 rounded-b-2xl
border-t border-gray-50 pt-3">
<p class="text-xs text-gray-600 leading-relaxed mb-4 font-medium whitespace-
pre-line">{{ item.desc }}</p>
<div v-if="item.address" class="flex">
<a :href="'https://maps.google.com/?q=' +
encodeURIComponent(item.address)" target="_blank" @click.stop
class="w-full flex justify-center items-center bg-white text-blue-600 border
border-blue-200 rounded-xl py-2.5 text-xs font-bold shadow-sm hover:bg-blue-50 transition-
colors">
<i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt mr-2 text-sm"></i> 在 Google Maps 開啟
</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- 3. Checklists -->
<div v-else-if="currentTab === 'checklists'" class="p-5 space-y-5" key="check">
<div v-for="(list, key) in checklists" :key="key"
class="bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden
transition-all duration-300"
:class="{'shadow-md': list.expanded}">
<div class="px-5 py-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-gray-50 to-white flex justify-between
items-center cursor-pointer" @click="list.expanded = !list.expanded">
<div class="flex items-center space-x-3">
<div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-rose-100 text-rose-500 flex items-center
justify-center text-sm">
<i :class="list.icon || 'fas fa-list-ul'"></i>
</div>
<span class="font-bold text-gray-800">{{ list.title }}</span>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center bg-white border border-gray-200 px-3 py-1 rounded-
full shadow-sm">
<span class="text-xs font-bold" :class="list.items.filter(i=>i.done).length ===
list.items.length && list.items.length > 0 ? 'text-green-500' : 'text-gray-500'">
{{ list.items.filter(i=>i.done).length }}/{{ list.items.length }}
</span>
<i :class="list.expanded ? 'fas fa-chevron-up' : 'fas fa-chevron-down'" class="text-
[10px] text-gray-400 ml-2"></i>
</div>
</div>
<div v-show="list.expanded" class="divide-y divide-gray-50 px-2 pb-3">
<div v-for="(item, idx) in list.items" :key="idx"
class="flex items-center p-3 hover:bg-rose-50/50 rounded-xl cursor-pointer
transition-colors m-1" @click="item.done = !item.done">
<div class="relative w-6 h-6 mr-3 flex-shrink-0">
<i :class="item.done ? 'fas fa-check-circle text-rose-500 text-xl' : 'far fa-circle text-
gray-300 text-xl'" class="absolute inset-0 transition-all duration-200"></i>
</div>
<div class="flex-1">
<div :class="{'line-through text-gray-400': item.done, 'text-gray-700': !item.done}"
class="text-sm font-medium transition-all">{{ item.label }}</div>
<div v-if="item.note" class="text-[11px] text-gray-400 mt-0.5"><i class="fas fa-
info-circle mr-1 opacity-70"></i>{{ item.note }}</div>
</div>
<button @click.stop="removeChecklistItem(key, idx)" class="ml-2 w-8 h-8
rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-gray-200 hover:text-red-400 active:bg-red-50
transition-colors focus:outline-none shrink-0">
<i class="fas fa-times text-xs"></i>
</button>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center p-2 m-1 mt-2 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl border border-
gray-200 focus-within:border-rose-300 focus-within:bg-white transition-colors shadow-sm">
<i class="fas fa-plus text-rose-300 ml-2 mr-2 text-sm"></i>
<input v-model="newChecklistInputs[key]" @keyup.enter="addChecklistItem(key)"
enterkeyhint="done" placeholder="自訂新項目..." class="flex-1 bg-transparent text-sm text-
gray-700 focus:outline-none py-1">
<button @click="addChecklistItem(key)"
:disabled="!newChecklistInputs[key].trim()"
class="bg-white border border-rose-100 text-rose-500 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-
lg text-xs font-bold hover:bg-rose-50 shadow-sm transition-colors ml-2 active:scale-95
disabled:opacity-40 disabled:active:scale-100">
加入
</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- 4. Resources -->
<div v-else-if="currentTab === 'resources'" class="flex flex-col h-full bg-gray-50/50"
key="res">
<div class="px-5 pt-4 pb-3 bg-white shadow-sm shrink-0 sticky top-0 z-10 flex space-
x-2.5 overflow-x-auto scrollbar-hide">
<button v-for="(name, val) in filterNames" :key="val" @click="resFilter = val"
class="px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold whitespace-nowrap transition-all
duration-300 border"
:class="resFilter === val ? 'bg-rose-500 text-white border-rose-500 shadow-md
shadow-rose-200' : 'bg-white text-gray-500 border-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-50'">
{{ name }}
</button>
</div>
<div class="p-5 space-y-4">
<div v-for="res in filteredResources" :key="res.name" class="bg-white rounded-2xl p-
4 shadow-sm border border-gray-100 relative overflow-hidden group">
<div class="absolute right-0 top-0 w-1.5 h-full" :class="res.type === 'attr' ? 'bg-
purple-400' : 'bg-orange-400'"></div>
<div class="flex justify-between items-start mb-2 pr-2">
<h3 class="font-bold text-gray-800 text-sm">{{ res.name }}</h3>
<span class="text-[10px] px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full font-bold flex items-center
shrink-0 ml-2"
:class="res.type === 'attr' ? 'bg-purple-50 text-purple-600' : 'bg-orange-50 text-
orange-600'">
<i :class="res.type === 'attr' ? 'fas fa-camera-retro mr-1' : 'fas fa-utensils mr-
1'"></i>{{ res.type === 'attr' ? '景點' : '餐廳' }}
</span>
</div>
<p class="text-xs text-gray-500 mb-4 leading-relaxed font-medium">{{ res.desc
}}</p>
<div class="flex items-center justify-between border-t border-gray-50 pt-3">
<span class="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500 bg-gray-100 px-3 py-1 rounded-lg"><i
class="fas fa-city mr-1.5 text-gray-400"></i>{{ res.city === 'seoul' ? '首爾' : '釜山' }}</span>
<a v-if="res.address" :href="'https://maps.google.com/?q=' +
encodeURIComponent(res.address)" target="_blank"
class="text-xs text-blue-500 font-bold bg-blue-50 px-3 py-1 rounded-lg hover:bg-
blue-100 transition-colors">
<i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt mr-1.5"></i>Google Maps
</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<!-- 5. Budget -->
<div v-else-if="currentTab === 'budget'" class="p-5 space-y-5" key="bud">
<div class="bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-900 to-gray-800 text-white rounded-3xl p-6
shadow-xl relative overflow-hidden">
<i class="fas fa-coins absolute -right-6 -top-6 text-8xl text-white opacity-5"></i>
<div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-4 relative z-10">
<div class="text-xs font-bold tracking-wider text-gray-400 uppercase">總預算額度
(HKD)</div>
<!-- 點擊進入全域編輯模式 -->
<button @click="editBudget = !editBudget" class="text-xs bg-white/10 hover:bg-
white/20 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full transition-colors backdrop-blur-sm flex items-center">
<i class="fas" :class="editBudget ? 'fa-check text-green-300' : 'fa-pen'"></i>
<span class="ml-1 font-bold tracking-wide">{{ editBudget ? '完成編輯' : '修改預算'
}}</span>
</button>
</div>
<div v-if="editBudget" class="flex space-x-2 mb-5 relative z-10">
<span class="text-3xl font-bold mt-1 text-rose-400">$</span>
<input v-model.number="budgetTotal" type="number" class="w-full bg-black/30
border border-white/20 rounded-xl text-3xl font-bold px-3 py-1 outline-none text-white
focus:border-rose-400 transition-colors">
</div>
<div v-else class="text-4xl font-bold mb-6 tracking-tight relative z-10">
<span class="text-rose-400 mr-1">$</span>{{ budgetTotal.toLocaleString() }}
</div>
<div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 border-t border-gray-700 pt-4 relative z-10">
<div class="bg-white/5 rounded-xl p-3 backdrop-blur-sm">
<div class="text-[10px] text-gray-400 mb-1 font-bold tracking-wider">剩餘可用
</div>
<div class="text-xl font-bold" :class="remainingBudget < 0 ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-
green-400'">
${{ remainingBudget.toLocaleString() }}
</div>
</div>
<div class="bg-white/5 rounded-xl p-3 backdrop-blur-sm">
<div class="text-[10px] text-gray-400 mb-1 font-bold tracking-wider">已花費</div>
<div class="text-xl font-bold text-white">${{ totalSpent.toLocaleString() }}</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="bg-white p-5 rounded-3xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100">
<h3 class="font-bold text-gray-800 text-sm mb-4 flex items-center">
<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-rose-100 text-rose-500 flex items-center justify-
center mr-2"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i></div>新增花費紀錄
</h3>
<div class="flex flex-col space-y-3">
<input v-model="newExpenseName" @keyup.enter="addExpense"
enterkeyhint="next" placeholder="花費項目 (例: 望遠市場小吃)" class="w-full border border-
gray-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-
rose-100 focus:border-rose-400 transition-all font-medium">
<div class="flex space-x-3">
<div class="relative flex-1">
<span class="absolute left-4 top-3 text-gray-400 font-bold">$</span>
<input v-model.number="newExpenseAmount" @keyup.enter="addExpense"
enterkeyhint="done" type="number" placeholder="金額" class="w-full border border-gray-200
rounded-xl pl-8 pr-4 py-3 text-sm bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-rose-
100 focus:border-rose-400 transition-all font-bold">
</div>
<button @click="addExpense" :disabled="!newExpenseName ||
!newExpenseAmount" class="bg-rose-500 hover:bg-rose-600 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-
xl font-bold text-sm shrink-0 shadow-md shadow-rose-200 transition-colors disabled:opacity-
50 disabled:shadow-none">加入</button>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-sm border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden
mb-8">
<div class="px-5 py-4 border-b border-gray-50 flex justify-between items-center bg-
gray-50/50">
<h3 class="font-bold text-gray-700 text-sm">支出明細</h3>
<span class="bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 text-[10px] px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full font-
bold">{{ allExpenses.length }} 筆紀錄</span>
</div>
<div class="divide-y divide-gray-50">
<div v-for="(item, idx) in allExpenses" :key="idx" class="p-4 flex justify-between
items-center hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">
<div class="flex items-center flex-1 mr-3">
<div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white text-xs
mr-3 shadow-sm shrink-0"
:class="item.fixed ? 'bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-400 to-purple-500' : 'bg-
gradient-to-br from-rose-400 to-orange-400'">
<i :class="item.fixed ? 'fas fa-plane-departure' : 'fas fa-receipt'"></i>
</div>
<div class="w-full">
<!-- 編輯模式：可以修改固定成本與名稱 -->
<input v-if="editBudget" v-model="item.name" class="w-full font-bold text-gray-
700 text-[13px] bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded px-2 py-1 outline-none
focus:border-rose-400 transition-colors shadow-sm" placeholder="名稱">
<!-- 正常顯示 -->
<div v-else>
<div class="font-bold text-gray-700 text-sm">{{ item.name }}</div>
<div class="text-[10px] text-gray-400">{{ item.fixed ? '固定成本' : '旅途花費'
}}</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="flex items-center shrink-0">
<!-- 編輯模式：可以修改金額 -->
<div v-if="editBudget" class="relative w-[75px]">
<span class="absolute left-1.5 top-[5px] text-gray-400 text-[10px] font-
bold">$</span>
<input v-model.number="item.amount" type="number" class="w-full font-bold
text-gray-800 text-[13px] tracking-tight bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded pl-4 pr-1
py-1 outline-none focus:border-rose-400 transition-colors shadow-sm text-right">
</div>
<!-- 正常顯示金額 -->
<span v-else class="font-bold text-gray-800 tracking-tight">${{
item.amount.toLocaleString() }}</span>
<!-- 垃圾桶邏輯：浮動花費隨時可刪；固定花費只有在「編輯模式」才能刪除 -->
<button v-show="editBudget || !item.fixed" @click="removeExpense(idx)"
class="ml-3 w-8 h-8 rounded-full text-red-300 bg-red-50 hover:bg-red-100 hover:text-red-600
transition-colors flex items-center justify-center focus:outline-none shrink-0">
<i class="fas fa-trash-alt text-xs"></i>
</button>
<!-- 排版佔位符 -->
<div v-show="!editBudget && item.fixed" class="ml-3 w-8 h-8"></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</transition>
</main>
<!-- Bottom Navigation -->
<nav class="nav-bar z-20">
<div class="nav-item" :class="{active: currentTab === 'dashboard'}" @click="currentTab
= 'dashboard'">
<i class="fas fa-heart"></i><span>總覽</span>
</div>
<div class="nav-item" :class="{active: currentTab === 'itinerary'}" @click="currentTab =
'itinerary'">
<i class="fas fa-map-signs"></i><span>行程</span>
</div>
<div class="nav-item" :class="{active: currentTab === 'checklists'}" @click="currentTab =
'checklists'">
<i class="fas fa-clipboard-check"></i><span>清單</span>
</div>
<div class="nav-item" :class="{active: currentTab === 'resources'}" @click="currentTab =
'resources'">
<i class="fas fa-bookmark"></i><span>資料庫</span>
</div>
<div class="nav-item" :class="{active: currentTab === 'budget'}" @click="currentTab =
'budget'">
<i class="fas fa-wallet"></i><span>預算</span>
</div>
</nav>
</div>
<script>
const { createApp, ref, computed, watch, onMounted } = Vue;
createApp({
setup() {
const currentTab = ref('dashboard');
const tabNames = { dashboard: '旅行總覽', itinerary: '詳細行程', checklists: '準備清單',
resources: '景點與餐廳', budget: '預算管理' };
const jumpToTab = (tabName) => { currentTab.value = tabName; };
const days = ['Day 1', 'Day 2', 'Day 3', 'Day 4', 'Day 5', 'Day 6', 'Day 7'];
const activeDay = ref('Day 1');
const itineraryHeaders = {
'Day 1': '3/27 (五) 首爾到埗日：落地暖身', 'Day 2': '3/28 (六) 首爾韓流情侶變身日',
'Day 3': '3/29 (日) 首爾近郊日：小法國村/南怡島', 'Day 4': '3/30 (一) 釜山大轉場：南浦
與甘川',
'Day 5': '3/31 (二) 釜山海邊主場：街拍與遊艇', 'Day 6': '4/1 (三) 松島 + 鎮海櫻花季 💍',
'Day 7': '4/2 (四) 尾日：穩陣收尾返港'
};
// 💍 完全恢復 v1.1.0 的深度還原文字內容
const itinerary = ref({
'Day 1': [
{ time: '14:55', title: '落地首爾與入境', desc: '抵達仁川機場，辦理入境手續。\n搭乘
AREX 機場鐵路或的士前往市區，享受初到首爾的興奮感。', done: false, expanded: false,
address: 'Incheon International Airport' },
{ time: '16:30', title: '到達住宿 check-in', desc: '前往麻浦/弘大附近的 Mercure
Ambassador 住宿放行李。\n稍作休息，在附近走走熟悉環境。', done: false, expanded: false,
address: '머큐어 앰배서더 서울 홍대' },
{ time: '19:00', title: '晚餐：옥동식 Okdongsik', desc: '第一晚的主餐。這是一家非常有質
感的豬肉湯飯，口味溫和，非常適合剛落地的腸胃。\n吃完後順接弘大周邊輕鬆散步。', done:
false, expanded: false, address: '서울특별시 마포구 양화로7길 44-10' },
{ time: '20:30', title: '弘大輕鬆散步', desc: '去便利店補給水和零食、找間小咖啡店坐坐
。\n簡單買少量日用品，遵從第一晚「不安排重型體驗」的原則。', done: false, expanded: false,
address: 'Hongdae Street' },
{ time: '22:00', title: '回酒店休息', desc: '第一晚不去汗蒸幕，早點回酒店洗澡休息，適
應節奏與養足精神應付明天。', done: false, expanded: false, address: '' }
],
'Day 2': [
{ time: '10:30', title: '弘大附近早餐 / Coffee', desc: '睡到自然醒，在弘大附近找間順眼
的 Cafe 吃早餐、補充咖啡因，開啟今天的變身日！', done: false, expanded: false, address:
'Hongdae' },
{ time: '11:00', title: 'MUSINSA 購物 (骨架)', desc: '前往 MUSINSA STANDARD
HONGDAE。\n主攻基本骨架單品：外套、上衣、西裝褲/裙。為接下來幾天建立基礎穿搭。',
done: false, expanded: false, address: 'MUSINSA STANDARD HONGDAE' },
{ time: '12:45', title: 'MUSINSA 購物 (配件)', desc: '轉戰 MUSINSA HONGDAE 本店。
\n主攻配件類：補鞋、斜揹袋、飾物、髮飾、Cap帽，讓整體造型更完整。', done: false,
expanded: false, address: 'MUSINSA HONGDAE' },
{ time: '14:30', title: 'Quick Lunch', desc: '以簡單、快、易消化為主，不刻意排隊追名店
，保留時間給下午的 Grooming 行程。', done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Hapjeong' },
{ time: '15:30', title: 'Grooming (髮型 & 美甲)', desc: '男生：髮型整理。\n女生：美甲。
\n理想做法為同步進行，不浪費約會時間。', done: false, expanded: false, address: '' },
{ time: '17:45', title: '回酒店換裝', desc: '帶著戰利品回酒店。換上今天買的全新情侶
Look，確認整體細節與儀式感！', done: false, expanded: false, address: '' },
{ time: '19:30', title: '韓牛燒肉飯局', desc: '穿著新 Look 閃亮登場，與說說、Vicky 會合
，共進高級韓牛燒肉晚餐。', done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Hongdae' }
],
'Day 3': [
{ time: '07:00', title: '早餐 & 前往集合', desc: '這天要早起。吃便利店買的麵包或飯糰等
簡單早餐，準備前往 Day trip 集合點。', done: false, expanded: false, address: '' },
{ time: '08:00', title: '出發 Day Trip', desc: '參加小法國村 / 南怡島 day trip 行程，上車
後可以補眠。', done: false, expanded: false, address: '' },
{ time: '12:00', title: '團內午餐', desc: '午餐跟隨旅行團安排，通常是附近的春川辣炒雞
排。', done: false, expanded: false, address: '' },
{ time: '13:30', title: '繼續近郊 Outing', desc: '在南怡島的林蔭大道散步、拍照。\n享受
遠離市區的情侶 outing 感與自然氛圍。', done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Nami Island'
},
{ time: '18:30', title: '返回首爾市區', desc: '跟團回到首爾解散後，搭乘地鐵或的士前往
望遠市場。', done: false, expanded: false, address: '' },
{ time: '19:30', title: '望遠市場晚餐 / 小吃', desc: '買 3-4 樣在地小吃 share！\n推薦：
炸雞、煎餅、紫菜飯卷等。可以帶回酒店吃或在附近解決。', done: false, expanded: false,
address: '서울특별시 마포구 포은로6길 일대' },
{ time: '22:00', title: '回住宿休息', desc: '結束一天近郊行程，不再安排弘大第二場，早
點休息準備明天的大轉場。', done: false, expanded: false, address: '' }
],
'Day 4': [
{ time: '07:30', title: '首爾 Check-out', desc: '吃完早餐後辦理退房，拖著行李前往首爾
站。', done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Seoul Station' },
{ time: '09:00', title: 'KTX 首爾 → 釜山', desc: '搭乘 KTX 展開大轉場。\n記得準備好
QR Code 車票，車程約 2.5 小時。', done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Busan Station' },
{ time: '12:00', title: '南浦放行李', desc: '抵達釜山站後轉乘至南浦站，前往 Griffin Bay
Hotel 放行李。', done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Griffin Bay Hotel Busan' },
{ time: '13:00', title: '午餐：密陽家豬肉湯飯', desc: '釜山的代表性第一餐 (밀양집)。\n注
意：為了保留體力與晚上的胃空間，請不要吃過量。', done: false, expanded: false, address:
'부산광역시 중구 중구로47번길 35' },
{ time: '14:00', title: '前往甘川文化村', desc: '搭乘地鐵、巴士或直接搭的士上山，準備
進入釜山第一日的主場。', done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Gamcheon Culture Village'
},
{ time: '15:00', title: '啟動 VBP 換韓服', desc: '✅ 於此處正式啟用 VBP (釜山通行證) 48
小時。\n換上韓服在彩色小屋間拍照，並使用 VBP 製作專屬的 Flipbook 手翻書留念。', done:
false, expanded: false, address: 'Gamcheon Culture Village' },
{ time: '18:30', title: '釜山塔夜景', desc: '✅ 使用 VBP 免費入場。\n從高空俯瞰南浦洞與
釜山港的絕美夜景。', done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Busan Tower' },
{ time: '19:45', title: '晚餐：南浦烤排骨', desc: '釜山第一晚正式晚餐！\n前往 남포동
마포갈비，必叫惹味排骨搭配冷麵的黃金組合。', done: false, expanded: false, address:
'부산광역시 중구 남포길 40-2' },
{ time: '21:00', title: '富平罐頭市場散步', desc: '飯後散步消食。只當作逛夜市和補一口
小吃，不建議在此當正餐吃。', done: false, expanded: false, address: '부산광역시 중구 부평1길 48'
}
],
'Day 5': [
{ time: '09:00', title: '早餐：豬肉湯飯/輕食', desc: '在南浦或出發海雲台前吃飽。', done:
false, expanded: false, address: '' },
{ time: '10:30', title: '海邊 Cafe', desc: '進入 Mipo 或 Cheongsapo 區域，找間面海的
咖啡廳享受海景氣氛。', done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Haeundae' },
{ time: '11:30', title: '藍線公園海岸列車', desc: '✅ 使用 VBP 兌換車票。\n搭乘超人氣的
海景列車，為海邊日揭開序幕。', done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Haeundae Blue Line
Park' },
{ time: '12:30', title: '海雲台輕午餐', desc: '走清爽路線，不吃太 heavy，因為下午要拍
照！', done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Haeundae Beach' },
{ time: '14:00', title: '情侶 Photo Shoot', desc: '換上我們精心挑選的情侶裝與 NB 鞋，
在海雲台沙灘拍下最自然的互動與街拍。', done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Haeundae
Beach' },
{ time: '17:30', title: 'Yacht Holic 遊艇', desc: '✅ 使用 VBP 免費搭乘 (必須預約)。\n在
海上吹風看夕陽與點燈的廣安大橋，享受屬於我們的浪漫時刻。', done: false, expanded:
false, address: 'Gwangan Bridge' },
{ time: '19:00', title: '晚餐：海雲台韓牛燒肉', desc: '街拍與遊艇後的高級慰勞！\n前往
해운대이름난암소갈비 享用海雲台著名的頂級韓牛燒肉。', done: false, expanded: false, address:
'부산광역시 해운대구 해운대해변로 333' },
{ time: '20:30', title: '汗蒸幕 / Spa Land', desc: '✅ 使用 VBP 免費入場。\n在五星級的
Spa Land 放鬆身心，完美收尾。', done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Spa Land Centum
City' }
],
'Day 6': [
{ time: '08:00', title: '早餐 & 前往松島', desc: '務必早起出發，避開纜車人潮排隊拖慢後
續節奏。', done: false, expanded: false, address: '' },
{ time: '09:00', title: '松島海上纜車', desc: '✅ 使用 VBP 兌換 (高票價項目)。\n享受跨越
海面的震撼視野。', done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Songdo Marine Cable Car' },
{ time: '10:30', title: '松島龍宮雲橋', desc: '✅ 使用 VBP 免費入場。\n纜車搭到對岸後的
短時間補充景點，走在懸崖邊的吊橋上。', done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Songdo
Yonggung Suspension Bridge' },
{ time: '11:00', title: '離開松島 & 午餐', desc: '返回釜山站附近，找間快食餐廳解決午餐
，準備參加下午的重頭戲。', done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Busan Station' },
{ time: '13:20', title: '鎮海櫻花團集合', desc: '💍 絕對不可遲到！\n前往釜山站 3 號出口
找導遊集合。', done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Busan Station Exit 3' },
{ time: '13:20', title: '鎮海櫻花團行程 💍', desc: '全旅程季節高潮！\n前往鎮海軍港節，
欣賞余佐川櫻花道與慶和火車站的絕美櫻花，準備瘋狂拍照。', done: false, expanded: false,
address: 'Jinhae' },
{ time: '21:30', title: '釜山站解散', desc: '賞完夜櫻後回到釜山站。視體力決定回酒店休
息或在附近簡單吃 late dinner，不再加排其他景點。', done: false, expanded: false, address:
'Busan Station' }
],
'Day 7': [
{ time: '07:30', title: '早餐 & Check-out', desc: '辦理退房，帶著滿滿回憶前往 KTX 車站
。', done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Busan Station' },
{ time: '早班', title: 'KTX 釜山 → 首爾', desc: '搭乘早班 KTX 返回首爾，貫徹「穩陣收尾
」的最高指導原則。', done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Seoul Station' },
{ time: '中午', title: '首爾站 Brunch & 補貨', desc: '不去明洞人擠人，直接在首爾站旁邊
的 Lotte Mart 買手信與零食。', done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Lotte Mart Seoul
Station' },
{ time: '13:30', title: '自由整理行李', desc: '找個空曠的地方或置物櫃旁，將戰利品塞進
行李箱，並確認機票與交通。', done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Seoul Station' },
{ time: '16:30', title: '離開首爾市區', desc: '搭乘 AREX 或機場鐵路前往仁川機場。',
done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Seoul Station' },
{ time: '17:30', title: '抵達仁川機場', desc: '保留充裕時間辦理登機、行李托運以及最重
要的【退稅手續】。', done: false, expanded: false, address: 'Incheon International Airport' },
{ time: '20:50', title: '起飛返港', desc: '帶著滿滿的回憶，結束這趟完美的婚前旅行！
💍', done: false, expanded: false, address: '' }
]
});
// 💍 完全恢復 v1.1.0 附帶 Note 細節的清單資料
const checklists = ref({
pre: { title: '出發前與重要證件', icon: 'fas fa-passport', expanded: true, items: [
{ label: '護照 (最少半年有效期)', done: false }, { label: '機票電子確認 / Boarding Pass',
done: false },
{ label: '酒店確認資料', note: '建議截圖保存，以防過關時無網絡', done: false }, {
label: 'KTX 電子車票 (QR Code)', done: false },
{ label: 'eSIM 或漫遊方案', note: '建議每日 >1GB 或無限流量', done: false }, { label: '
信用卡', note: '確認已開通海外提款及簽帳功能', done: false },
{ label: '少量韓元現金', note: '約 10-20萬 KRW，用於小吃及路邊攤', done: false }, {
label: '交通卡 (T-money)', note: '可在當地便利店充值', done: false }
]},
booking: { title: '預約項目追蹤', icon: 'fas fa-calendar-check', expanded: false, items: [
{ label: '首爾 ↔ 釜山 KTX 車票', note: 'Day 4 去程 / Day 7 回程', done: false }, { label:
'南怡島/小法國村 Day Trip', note: '確認集合憑證', done: false },
{ label: '鎮海櫻花團', note: '確認 Day 6 釜山站集合時間', done: false }, { label: 'Yacht
Holic 遊艇', note: 'Day 5 黃昏場，需出示 VBP', done: false },
{ label: 'VBP 48小時通行證', note: '確認收到電子 QR Code', done: false }, { label: '髮
型預約 (男生)', note: 'Day 2 下午', done: false },
{ label: '美甲預約 (女生)', note: 'Day 2 下午', done: false }
]},
pack: { title: '行李與打包清單', icon: 'fas fa-suitcase', expanded: false, items: [
{ label: '行動電源 & 充電線', done: false }, { label: '萬能插頭', note: '韓國為雙圓腳插頭
', done: false },
{ label: '外套 (1-2件)', note: '需可防風及應付日夜溫差', done: false }, { label: '基本上衣
/針織', done: false },
{ label: '好走的鞋', note: '旅行必備，另加街拍用 NB 鞋', done: false }, { label: '髮泥/髮
蠟/小梳', done: false },
{ label: '紙巾/濕紙巾/小鏡子', done: false }, { label: '常用藥品', note: '腸胃藥、感冒藥、
止痛藥', done: false },
{ label: '泳衣', note: 'Spa Land 汗蒸幕備用', done: false }, { label: '小卡片/手寫信',
note: '旅行儀式感大加分 💍', done: false }
]},
shopHis: { title: '購物清單 (男生)', icon: 'fas fa-male', expanded: false, items: [
{ label: '乾淨版短身外套', done: false }, { label: '白色高質素素 T', done: false },
{ label: '淺灰/黑/海軍藍針織上衣', done: false }, { label: '黑色直筒西褲', done: false },
{ label: '淺藍/中藍寬直牛仔褲', done: false }, { label: '白色/灰白色波鞋', done: false },
{ label: '黑色或灰色 cap 帽', done: false }, { label: '小型斜揹袋', done: false },
{ label: '簡約金屬戒指/頸鏈', done: false }
]},
shopHers: { title: '購物清單 (女生)', icon: 'fas fa-female', expanded: false, items: [
{ label: '短版外套', done: false }, { label: '貼身基本款上衣', done: false },
{ label: 'Cardigan/薄針織', done: false }, { label: '高腰直筒長褲/闊褲', done: false },
{ label: 'A字短裙/百褶短裙', done: false }, { label: '長裙/針織裙', done: false },
{ label: '白鞋/樂福鞋/Mary Jane', done: false }, { label: '小手袋', done: false },
{ label: '髮飾 2-3 件', done: false }, { label: '簡約耳環/頸鏈/戒指', done: false }
]}
});
const newChecklistInputs = ref({ pre: '', booking: '', pack: '', shopHis: '', shopHers: '' });
const addChecklistItem = (key) => {
const label = newChecklistInputs.value[key].trim();
if (label) {
checklists.value[key].items.push({ label: label, note: '', done: false });
newChecklistInputs.value[key] = '';
}
};
const removeChecklistItem = (key, idx) => { checklists.value[key].items.splice(idx, 1); };
const filterNames = { all: '全部', seoul: '首爾', busan: '釜山', attr: '景點', rest: '餐廳' };
const resFilter = ref('all');
const resourceList = [
{ name: '弘大 (Hongdae) / 合井', city: 'seoul', type: 'attr', desc: '首爾旅程起步區、變身日
主場。包含 MUSINSA STANDARD 與潮流服飾店。合井區氣氛較 calmer，適合安排髮型店。',
address: 'Hongdae, Seoul' },
{ name: '望遠市場 (Mangwon)', city: 'seoul', type: 'attr', desc: '在地傳統市場，適合買炸
雞、煎餅、紫菜飯卷等小吃帶走，或在此簡單解決晚餐。', address: '서울특별시 마포구 포은로6길
일대' },
{ name: '南怡島/小法國村', city: 'seoul', type: 'attr', desc: '首爾近郊情侶 outing 核心，林
蔭大道自然生態感與畫面感極強，適合拍照。', address: 'Nami Island' },
{ name: '옥동식 (Okdongsik)', city: 'seoul', type: 'rest', desc: '第一晚晚餐推薦。口味極溫
和的高質感豬肉湯飯，非常適合剛落地的腸胃，不用排隊排太久。', address: '서울특별시 마포구
양화로7길 44-10' },
{ name: '甘川文化村', city: 'busan', type: 'attr', desc: '釜山第一日主場，色彩繽紛的山城
。可在此換韓服並製作 Flipbook 手翻書。', address: 'Gamcheon Culture Village' },
{ name: '海雲台 / 藍線公園', city: 'busan', type: 'attr', desc: '釜山海邊主場。搭乘海岸列
車 (VBP項目) 與進行情侶街拍的核心區域，周邊有很多海景 Cafe。', address: 'Haeundae
Beach' },
{ name: 'Yacht Holic 遊艇', city: 'busan', type: 'attr', desc: '黃昏豪華遊艇體驗 (VBP項目
)。從海上看夕陽與廣安大橋，浪漫指數最高。', address: 'Gwangan Bridge' },
{ name: '鎮海軍港節 (櫻花)', city: 'busan', type: 'attr', desc: '一年一度的櫻花盛典。必拍
余佐川櫻花道與慶和火車站，全旅程最美季節限定記憶。', address: 'Jinhae' },
{ name: '密陽家豬肉湯飯', city: 'busan', type: 'rest', desc: '抵達釜山的代表性第一餐
(밀양집)。建議不要點太多，保留胃部空間。', address: '부산광역시 중구 중구로47번길 35' },
{ name: '南浦烤排骨', city: 'busan', type: 'rest', desc: 'Day 4 晚餐 (마포갈비)。必叫惹味排
骨搭配冷麵的黃金組合。', address: '부산광역시 중구 남포길 40-2' },
{ name: '海雲台韓牛燒肉', city: 'busan', type: 'rest', desc: 'Day 5 晚餐
(해운대이름난암소갈비)。街拍與遊艇後的高級慰勞。', address: '부산광역시 해운대구 해운대해변로 333' }
];
const filteredResources = computed(() => {
if (resFilter.value === 'all') return resourceList;
if (resFilter.value === 'seoul') return resourceList.filter(r => r.city === 'seoul');
if (resFilter.value === 'busan') return resourceList.filter(r => r.city === 'busan');
if (resFilter.value === 'attr') return resourceList.filter(r => r.type === 'attr');
if (resFilter.value === 'rest') return resourceList.filter(r => r.type === 'rest');
return resourceList;
});
const editBudget = ref(false);
const budgetTotal = ref(30000);
const newExpenseName = ref('');
const newExpenseAmount = ref('');
const fixedExpenses = ref([
{ name: '機票 (預估)', amount: 7500, fixed: true },
{ name: '首爾/釜山住宿 (預估)', amount: 6000, fixed: true },
{ name: 'KTX 來回', amount: 1300, fixed: true },
{ name: 'Day Trip & 櫻花團', amount: 1600, fixed: true },
{ name: 'VBP + 遊艇 + 街拍 + 美甲', amount: 3500, fixed: true }
]);
const floatingExpenses = ref([]);
// --- v3.0 Computed Stats ---
const itineraryStats = computed(() => {
let total = 0; let done = 0;
Object.values(itinerary.value).forEach(dayArr => {
total += dayArr.length;
done += dayArr.filter(item => item.done).length;
});
const percent = total === 0 ? 0 : Math.round((done / total) * 100);
return { total, done, percent };
});
const checklistStats = computed(() => {
let total = 0; let done = 0;
Object.values(checklists.value).forEach(list => {
total += list.items.length;
done += list.items.filter(item => item.done).length;
});
const percent = total === 0 ? 0 : Math.round((done / total) * 100);
return { total, done, percent };
});
const allExpenses = computed(() => [...floatingExpenses.value,
...fixedExpenses.value]);
const totalSpent = computed(() => allExpenses.value.reduce((sum, item) => sum +
(item.amount || 0), 0));
const remainingBudget = computed(() => budgetTotal.value - totalSpent.value);
const budgetPercent = computed(() => {
if (budgetTotal.value <= 0) return 0;
return Math.min(100, Math.round((totalSpent.value / budgetTotal.value) * 100));
});
const addExpense = () => {
if(newExpenseName.value && newExpenseAmount.value) {
floatingExpenses.value.unshift({
name: newExpenseName.value,
amount: Number(newExpenseAmount.value),
fixed: false
});
newExpenseName.value = '';
newExpenseAmount.value = '';
}
};
const removeExpense = (index) => {
if (index < floatingExpenses.value.length) {
floatingExpenses.value.splice(index, 1);
} else {
fixedExpenses.value.splice(index - floatingExpenses.value.length, 1);
}
};
watch([itinerary, checklists, budgetTotal, floatingExpenses, fixedExpenses], () => {
localStorage.setItem('koreaTripAppData', JSON.stringify({
itinerary: itinerary.value,
checklists: checklists.value,
budgetTotal: budgetTotal.value,
floatingExpenses: floatingExpenses.value,
fixedExpenses: fixedExpenses.value
}));
}, { deep: true });
onMounted(() => {
const savedData = localStorage.getItem('koreaTripAppData');
if (savedData) {
try {
const parsed = JSON.parse(savedData);
if (parsed.itinerary) itinerary.value = parsed.itinerary;
if (parsed.checklists) {
Object.keys(parsed.checklists).forEach(key => {
if (checklists.value[key]) {
checklists.value[key].items = parsed.checklists[key].items;
checklists.value[key].expanded = parsed.checklists[key].expanded;
}
});
}
if (parsed.budgetTotal) budgetTotal.value = parsed.budgetTotal;
if (parsed.floatingExpenses) floatingExpenses.value = parsed.floatingExpenses;
if (parsed.fixedExpenses) fixedExpenses.value = parsed.fixedExpenses;
} catch (error) { console.error("無法讀取儲存的資料", error); }
}
});
return {
currentTab, tabNames, jumpToTab, days, activeDay, itinerary, itineraryHeaders,
checklists, newChecklistInputs, addChecklistItem, removeChecklistItem,
filterNames, resFilter, filteredResources,
editBudget, budgetTotal, newExpenseName, newExpenseAmount, allExpenses,
totalSpent, remainingBudget, addExpense, removeExpense,
itineraryStats, checklistStats, budgetPercent
};
}
}).mount('#app');
</script>
</body>
</html>
